client_id.description: Microsoft identity platform (Azure AD) application (client) ID for the refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Microsoft identity platform application client secret (optional for public/native client app registrations). Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

developer_token.description: Microsoft Advertising developer token, sent as the DeveloperToken header on every Customer/Campaign Management request; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Microsoft identity platform OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

tenant_id.description: Azure AD tenant id used to build the default token_url (https://login.microsoftonline.com/<tenant_id>/oauth2/v2.0/token). Defaults to 'common' when unset.

base_url.description: Customer Management REST service base URL override for tests or proxies.

campaign_base_url.description: Campaign Management REST service base URL override for tests or proxies. Campaign-scoped streams (campaigns, ad_groups, ads) target this service instead of base_url.

token_url.description: Microsoft identity platform OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. Defaults to https://login.microsoftonline.com/<tenant_id>/oauth2/v2.0/token. MUST be https in production; the hook fails closed on a non-https or unparseable value.

customer_id.description: Microsoft Advertising CustomerId header/body scoping value, sent on Campaign Management requests and included in the accounts (AccountsInfo) query body when set.

customer_account_id.description: Microsoft Advertising CustomerAccountId header value for Campaign Management requests. Falls back to account_id when unset.

account_id.description: Single advertiser account id; used as the CustomerAccountId header fallback and as the sole AccountId when account_ids is unset.

account_ids.description: Comma-separated advertiser account ids. The campaigns stream fans out one QueryByAccountId request per id, stamping account_id onto every emitted record. Falls back to a single-element list from customer_account_id/account_id when unset.

campaign_id.description: Campaign id used to scope the ad_groups stream's AdGroups/QueryByCampaignId request body.

ad_group_id.description: Ad group id used to scope the ads stream's Ads/QueryByAdGroupId request body.
